description: The 15-passenger minibus is the most compact option in our fleet, perfect for small groups that want to travel together without splitting into multiple cars. Despite its smaller size, the 15-passenger minibus offers comfortable seating, climate control, and luggage storage. It is the most affordable charter bus option and is ideal for airport transfers, wedding shuttles between hotels and venues, corporate dinner outings, and small team building events. The minibus is easy to navigate through tight city streets and can access pickup locations where full-size motorcoaches cannot fit.
idealFor: Ideal for small corporate groups, wedding party shuttles, and airport transfers
idealForList: Small wedding party shuttles (ceremony to reception)
Corporate dinner or happy hour outings
Hotel-to-venue shuttles for events under 15 people
popularRoutes: MCO Airport to Disney resorts (25 mi)
Cocoa Beach hotel to Port Canaveral (10 mi)

description: The 18-passenger minibus hits the sweet spot for small-to-medium groups. With slightly more capacity than the 15-passenger option but still compact enough for easy maneuvering, the 18-passenger minibus is one of our most requested vehicles. It offers ample legroom, overhead storage, and a smooth ride for both short transfers and longer day trips across Florida. Many groups choose this size for bachelor and bachelorette parties, small corporate retreats, and family reunion airport pickups.
idealFor: Perfect for bachelorette parties, small corporate retreats, and family groups
idealForList: Restaurant hop and brewery tour shuttles
popularRoutes: Fort Lauderdale hotels to Las Olas

description: The 20-passenger minibus is our most versatile mid-size vehicle. Large enough for a full classroom or mid-size wedding party but small enough to navigate residential neighborhoods and hotel driveways with ease. The 20-passenger configuration is extremely popular for school field trips, corporate employee shuttles, and cruise port transfers for medium-sized family groups. With luggage storage underneath and overhead, it handles suitcases and bags without crowding the cabin.
idealFor: Versatile choice for school groups, corporate shuttles, and cruise transfers
features: Wide entry steps for easy boarding
idealForList: School field trips to museums and parks
popularRoutes: Orlando to Kennedy Space Center day trip
School to Brevard Zoo field trip
Hotels to Orange County Convention Center

description: The 25-passenger minibus bridges the gap between compact minibuses and full-size motorcoaches. It is the largest minibus option available, offering more capacity while maintaining the maneuverability and lower cost of a minibus. The 25-passenger vehicle is popular for wedding guest shuttles where you need to move a larger bridal party, corporate teams attending conferences, and school groups going on day-long field trips. The per-person cost at 25 passengers makes this one of the most cost-effective options in our fleet.
idealFor: Cost-effective for medium groups - weddings, conferences, and school trips
idealForList: Sports team and fan group transport
popularRoutes: Orlando to Port Canaveral cruise shuttle
MCO Airport to Universal Orlando hotels
Tampa to Busch Gardens group trip
Multiple hotel pickups to convention center

description: The 30-passenger charter bus is where you step up to full coach-style amenities in a mid-size package. These vehicles typically feature higher ceilings, wider seats, more legroom, and often come with onboard restrooms - a major comfort upgrade for trips over an hour. The 30-passenger bus is the preferred choice for corporate groups wanting premium comfort, multi-day tour groups, and larger wedding parties. Many of our premium coaches seat 30-40 passengers and feature leather seating, USB charging, and entertainment systems.
idealFor: Premium comfort for corporate retreats, tours, and larger wedding groups
idealForList: Corporate retreat and team building transport

description: The 35-passenger charter bus offers substantial capacity with all the amenities of a full-size motorcoach. These vehicles are spacious enough for large groups while still being easier to park and maneuver than a 56-passenger coach. The 35-passenger bus is a top choice for school athletic teams, medium corporate groups, and organizations that want motorcoach-level comfort without renting a full 56-seat vehicle. With reclining seats, restroom, entertainment system, and large luggage bays, passengers enjoy the same ride quality as a full-size coach.
idealFor: Full motorcoach comfort for medium-large groups and athletic teams
popularRoutes: High school team to away games across FL

description: The 40-passenger charter bus is a full-size motorcoach with slightly fewer seats than the maximum capacity models, meaning more legroom and wider aisles for every passenger. This is the preferred configuration for groups that prioritize comfort - corporate VIP transport, luxury wedding shuttles, and long-distance tours where passengers will spend hours on board. The extra space per person makes a noticeable difference on trips longer than 2 hours.
idealFor: Extra-comfort motorcoach for VIP groups, luxury weddings, and long-distance tours
popularRoutes: Orlando to Miami luxury charter (4 hr)

description: The 56-passenger motorcoach is our flagship vehicle - the full-size charter bus that handles the biggest groups at the lowest per-person cost. When you need to move 45-56 people together, the motorcoach is the only practical option that keeps everyone on one vehicle with luggage stored safely below. These are the same vehicles used by professional sports teams, touring musicians, and major corporations. With reclining seats, onboard restroom, entertainment systems, WiFi, power outlets, and massive luggage bays, the 56-passenger motorcoach delivers a premium travel experience at scale. For groups over 56, we coordinate multi-bus service with identical vehicles and synchronized scheduling.
idealFor: Maximum capacity at lowest per-person cost - large groups, events, and organizations
features: 56 reclining seats with armrests and headrests
USB and 110V power outlets at every row
idealForList: Large wedding guest shuttles (100+ guests with 2 buses)
Cruise port transfers for large families
popularRoutes: Large cruise group MCO to Port Canaveral
School district to Kennedy Space Center
Church group Tampa to Orlando conference
Fan bus Orlando to Raymond James Stadium
